title: soulangia thymifolia
intro: Soulangia thymifolia, also known as Mexican valerian or thymifolia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Valerianaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its sedative and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to the presence of valerenic acid and isovalerenic acid. Soulangia thymifolia is used to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, and its health benefits also include its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and menstrual cramps.
